name: Hello
description: Prints a hello banner. Demo skill for the Skills Browser.
content:
---
name: hello
description: Demo skill — prints a hello banner.
---

Print the following lines verbatim, then exit cleanly:

  Hello from Mortar & Pestle.
  Installed via Skills Browser.

name: Timestamp
description: Prints the current ISO 8601 date and time.
content:
---
name: timestamp
description: Demo skill — prints the current ISO 8601 timestamp.
---

Run `date -Iseconds` via Bash. Print the output verbatim. No other commentary.

name: Vault Stats
description: Prints page and link counts from the vault manifest.
content:
---
name: vault-stats
description: Demo skill — print vault page, link, and embed counts.
---

Read `Infrastructure/.cache/vault_manifest.json`. Sum the relevant fields and print:

  Pages: <count>
  Outbound links: <count>
  Embeds: <count>

If the manifest is missing, print an error and suggest running `/manifest` first.
